TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Talunas, title = Talunas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talunas} }

S.FORM: alang Talunas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 88 buwan, 327 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 273 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 54 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Á¨¨11ťĄįŤąáŚ∑īŚĖúŚĎäťÉ®ŤźĹťáćÁĖä. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Talunas hya' ga Su nun sung. tay mkyahu' na Talunas hya' ga Pasikau. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Talunas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Talunas ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Talunas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Genhe'I go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 88 buwan, 327 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 83% kyan ku 273 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 17% kyan ku 54 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Á¨¨11ťĄįŤąáŚ∑īŚĖúŚĎäťÉ®ŤźĹťáćÁĖä. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Talunas hya' ga Su nun sung. tay mkyahu' na Talunas hya' ga Pasikau. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Talunas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Talunas ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč talunas~…ē …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu …£enńße Ēi …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, ************. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na talunas~…ē ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēu nun s~…ēuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na talunas~…ē ńßja Ē …£a pas~…ēikau. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč talunas~…ē …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč talunas~…ē …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
